L1_headline: + HOLX – Christiana Stamoulis acquired 3,190 restricted stock units. | 02/26/2026
L2_brief: Director Christiana Stamoulis acquired 3,190 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Hologic Inc on 02/26/2026. The RSUs vest on the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders and settle one-for-one into shares of common stock. Following the transaction, Stamoulis holds 50,526 shares of common stock directly.

transactions.price_per_share: N/A (RSU grant; no purchase price listed)

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a standard director RSU grant. The 3,190 RSUs vest on the date of the 2027 Annual Meeting of Stockholders and convert one-for-one into common stock. The grant represents approximately 6.3% of Stamoulis's post-transaction holdings of 50,526 shares. No open-market purchase or sale activity is indicated.
risks_flagged: No 10b5-1 plan indicated; this is a non-discretionary director compensation grant
No price disclosed for the RSU award, consistent with a compensatory grant rather than an open-market transaction
